findings_details.title: mkdtempSync temp directories never cleaned up
findings_details.body: makeApp() calls mkdtempSync on every invocation but no afterEach removes the created directories. With multiple describe blocks and multiple it() calls each, every test run leaks temp directories. Fix: capture the dir in makeApp, return it alongside the app, and add afterEach cleanup; or use a single shared makeApp per describe block with its own afterEach(rmSync).

findings_details.title: getCache().clear() is redundant after setClientForTesting(null)
findings_details.body: setClientForTesting() already calls cache.clear() internally (github-poller.ts:100). Every beforeEach that calls setClientForTesting(null) followed by getCache().clear() clears the cache twice. The redundant call adds noise and could mislead future readers. Affects lines 58-59, 174-176, and 217-219. Fix: remove the standalone getCache().clear() calls from all three blocks.

findings_details.title: Coalescing beforeEach uses single-line multi-statement style inconsistent with all other blocks
findings_details.body: Line 103 packs three statements on one line with semicolons. Every other describe block in this file uses a multi-line beforeEach body. Fix: expand to the multi-line style used elsewhere for consistency.

findings_details.title: srv! non-null assertion is redundant inside if (srv) guard
findings_details.body: afterEach uses `if (srv) { ... srv!.close(...) }`. The if guard already narrows srv to non-null within the block; the ! assertion is misleading. Fix: change srv!.close(() => r()) to srv.close(() => r()) inside the guard.

findings_details.title: mock.calls cast pattern duplicated verbatim three times
findings_details.body: The pattern `requestSpy.mock.calls as unknown as [string, Record<string, unknown>][]` followed by .find or .filter on the route string appears at lines 129-130, 190-191, and 208-209. Fix: extract a helper function that encapsulates the cast and commit-call filter, reducing three identical cast sites to a single reusable call.

findings_details.title: seedPR carries fields irrelevant to any assertion
findings_details.body: The PullRequest literal in seedPR() sets isDraft, ciStatus, reviewState, hasMergeConflict, needsAttention, failedChecks, reviewers, requestedReviewers, ciCommitSha, ciIsStale, approvalIsStale - none are asserted on by any test. They obscure the four fields that matter: repo, branch, state, headSha. Fix: identify which fields the PullRequest type requires vs optional, and supply only those needed for the type constraint; move optional noise fields to a typed defaults object.

findings_details.title: makeApp and seedPR lack explicit return type annotations
findings_details.body: makeApp() at line 31 and seedPR() at line 40 have no explicit return type annotations. Project uses TypeScript strict mode and the convention is explicit return-type annotation. Fix: add `: express.Express` to makeApp and `: void` to seedPR.
